title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Footprint Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Footprint Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint Holdings Services! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint Holdings Services:
Reliance Footprint Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint Holdings Services!
